mapper.select: SELECT p.permission_code FROM user u LEFT OUTER JOIN user_bind_role ubr ON u.user_id = ubr.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN role_bind_permission rbp ON ubr.role_id = rbp.role_id LEFT OUTER JOIN permission p ON rbp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE u.email = #{username};

SELECT p.permission_id, p.permission_code, p.parent_id, p.is_menu, p.permission_name, p.path FROM user u LEFT OUTER JOIN user_bind_role ubr ON u.user_id = ubr.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN role_bind_permission rbp ON ubr.role_id = rbp.role_id LEFT OUTER JOIN permission p ON rbp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE u.email = #{username} AND p.parent_id = '0' AND p.is_menu = '1';
SELECT p.permission_id, p.permission_code, p.parent_id, p.is_menu, p.permission_name, p.path FROM permission p where parent_id = #{parentId} and is_menu = '1';
